qa_pairs.question: How is membership automatically assigned for Default RAPs compared to RAC RAPs with either HPC or Cloud resource allocations?
qa_pairs.answer: For a Default RAP, all of a PI's activated sponsored user roles are always members, and this cannot be modified, although a PI can deactivate any sponsored role at any time. For a RAC RAP with HPC resources, all of a PI's sponsored user roles, all associated Co-PI roles, and all sponsored user roles of the associated Co-PIs are automatically added as members, and any new role sponsored by the PI after the RAP's creation will also be automatically added. For a RAC RAP with Cloud resources, only the PI is added as a member at the time of creation.

qa_pairs.question: What are the three permission levels for membership within a RAC RAP, and what are the responsibilities or capabilities associated with each?
qa_pairs.answer: The three RAP membership permission levels are Owner, Manager, and Member. The Owner, which is solely the PI, owns the RAP and all associated allocations and can add or remove Managers and Members. A Manager has elevated permission on CCDB to make membership changes and can use the PI's allocation, but cannot make changes on project/nearline file systems on behalf of the PIs. A Member can use the PI’s allocation in the corresponding cluster(s) but cannot make any modifications to the RAP membership.

qa_pairs.question: If an individual has an existing Alliance account (CCI) and their position or sponsor changes, or if they lose their password, what actions should they take instead of creating a new account?
qa_pairs.answer: Each person can only have one Alliance account (CCI); requests for duplicate CCIs are refused. If an individual has an existing CCI and their position or sponsor has changed, they should apply for a new role by logging into their existing account and visiting the 'apply for a new role' form. If they have forgotten their password, they can reset it. If they can no longer access the email address on file, they should email accounts@tech.alliancecan.ca for an update.
